); // ─── FORUM DISCUSSION ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Direct discussion with teachers export const StudentForum = () => (
+ New Discussion]} /> {[ { avatar: "A", name: "Ananya Reddy", title: "Help needed: React useState hook not updating", subject: "Full Stack Dev · Dr. Anand Raj", replies: 2, time: "1hr ago", status: "Open", stype: "primary" }, { avatar: "S", name: "Sneha Iyer", title: "Best resources for Python Data Analysis?", subject: "Data Science · Dr. Anand Raj", replies: 8, time: "3hrs ago", status: "Answered", stype: "success" }, { avatar: "R", name: "Rahul Mehta", title: "Exam tips for Cyber Security midterm?", subject: "Cyber Security · Mr. Ravi Shankar", replies: 14, time: "1 day ago", status: "Hot 🔥", stype: "warning" }, ].map(d => (
{d.title}

{d.status}
))}
); // ─── STUDENT NOTIFICATIONS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── export const StudentNotifications = () => (
Mark All Read]} /> {[ { icon: "📝", title: "New Assignment Posted: EDA Assignment", sub: "Data Science · Dr. Anand Raj · 2 hrs ago", unread: true }, { icon: "⚠️", title: "Exam Scheduled: Cyber Security Midterm — Tomorrow 10 AM", sub: "Cyber Security · 5 hrs ago", unread: true }, { icon: "✅", title: "Assignment Graded: 88/100", sub: "Full Stack Dev · Yesterday", unread: true }, { icon: "🎥", title: "Live Class Starting in 30 minutes", sub: "Full Stack Dev · 2 days ago", unread: false }, { icon: "🏆", title: "You ranked #12 in Department Leaderboard", sub: "Performance Update · 3 days ago", unread: false }, ].map((n, i) => (
{n.icon}
{n.title}
{n.sub}
{n.unread &&
}
))}
); // ─── STUDENT DASHBOARD WRAPPER ──────────────────────────────────────────────── // Routes all student pages, wraps in DashLayout sidebar + header const STUDENT_PAGES = { overview: { comp: StudentOverview, label: "Dashboard" }, profile: { comp: StudentProfile, label: "My Profile" }, courses: { comp: StudentCourses, label: "My Courses" }, learning: { comp: LearningBoard, label: "Learning Board" }, schedule: { comp: StudentSchedule, label: "Schedules" }, tasks: { comp: StudentTasks, label: "Tasks & Assignments" }, performance: { comp: StudentPerformance, label: "Performance" }, forum: { comp: StudentForum, label: "Forum" }, notifications: { comp: StudentNotifications, label: "Notifications" }, }; const StudentDashboard = ({ onLogout }) => { const [page, setPage] = useState("overview"); const profilePct = 45; const { comp: Comp } = STUDENT_PAGES[page] || STUDENT_PAGES.overview; return ( setPage("profile")} /> ); }; export default StudentDashboard;
